summary:
Executive strategic alignment call between the AnswerAgent/Last Rev team (Brad, Adam) and IAS (Akash Relan, with Brad Gilmore mentioned but absent). Akash shared IAS's 2026 AI strategy which has two pillars: (1) operational efficiency - targeting ~15% employee productivity improvement via AI, with AnswerAI playing a central role, and (2) customer experience improvement - expanding the Help Center chatbot to all customers by end of H1. A major win was shared: during a recent board meeting, IAS's Chief Product Officer live-demoed AnswerAI to answer a question about PRC/Contentful documents, and it performed perfectly.

Akash outlined H2 vision to merge the Help Center chatbot with an internal Signal product chatbot, and to integrate with an RPA project (Automation Anywhere) for automated tag wrapping via the chatbot. The RPA project targets end of March. They also discussed the Google Analytics user ID tracking issue - Mars's team is struggling with BigQuery, and Adam proposed storing user ID in a custom field (similar to client key) as a parallel approach that avoids BigQuery entirely. Akash was receptive. Brad proposed a follow-up Tuesday call to demo Alpha Claw apps that address IAS's use cases around meeting prep, QBRs, and productivity measurement.
keyDiscussionPoints: IAS 2026 AI strategy: 15% employee productivity gain + customer experience improvement
AnswerAI successful board meeting demo - CPO used it live for PRC document question
Help Center AI search rollout excitement - Susan working on internal/external communications
Plan to expand chatbot to all customers (Rohila pushing for maximum adoption)
Google Analytics user ID tracking - BigQuery struggles, custom field proposed as alternative
H2 vision: merge Help Center chatbot with Signal product chatbot
RPA project with Automation Anywhere for automated tag wrapping - March deadline
Long-term vision: chatbot triggers RPA for self-service tag wrapping
Measuring AI productivity gains is the hardest challenge
IAS considering internal AI steering committee/sharing channel
Brad offered advisory help on setting up empirical productivity metrics
decisions: Adam to try storing user ID in custom field as parallel approach to BigQuery
Will demo Alpha Claw apps on Tuesday call
IAS expanding AI search/chatbot to all customers (beyond initial 100)
RPA project targeting end of March for automated tag wrapping

actionItems.action: Implement user ID in custom field for analytics tracking (parallel to BigQuery approach)
Prepare Alpha Claw/app demos for Tuesday IAS call
Prepare Alpha Claw/app demos for Tuesday IAS call
Get enhanced search + analytics data finalization for broader rollout
Work with Mars's team on BigQuery user ID research

followUp: Tuesday demo call with IAS team
User ID custom field implementation and testing
AI search rollout communications from Susan
